raw_responses.title: Don't Waste Bits! Adaptive KV-Cache Quantization (2026/04)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: learned policy assigns bit-width PROPORTIONAL TO TOKEN IMPORTANCE; MLP controller uses entropy-based uncertainty, attention variance, quality score to select per-token KV precision.

raw_responses.title: QuickSilver Dynamic Token-Level Inference (2026/05)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: Adaptive Matryoshka Quantization — tokens assigned bit-widths BASED ON ENTROPY at mid-network layers; per-token precision scaling reduces compute on low-entropy spans.

raw_responses.title: QTALE: Quantization-Robust Token-Adaptive Layer Execution (2026/02)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: token-adaptive execution + quantization for efficient inference; entropy regularization preserves diversity.

raw_responses.title: Token-Level Entropy Gating overview
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: token-level entropy gating modulates inference per token via Shannon entropy of output distribution.

raw_responses.title: Cache Me If You Must: Adaptive KV Quantization (ICML 2025)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: adaptive KV-cache quantization based on access patterns.

raw_responses.title: Progressive Mixed-Precision Decoding (ICLR 2026)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: phase-aware precision varies across tokens; layers at different precisions at different inference points.
